The principal amount of the DDTL 2.0 Facility is required
to be repaid in quarterly installments, beginning in

The principal amount of the DDTL 3.0 Facility is required
to be repaid in monthly installments, beginning in April
2026, with the final payment due in August 2030. The

The principal amount of the DDTL 2.1 Facility is required

The DDTL 4.0 Facility provides for delayed draw term
loans available in one or more draws until the
commitment termination date in June 2027. The
maturity date of the DDTL 4.0 Facility is March 31, 2032.
